name: High-fructose corn syrup
description: Highly processed sugar linked to obesity and metabolic diseases.

name: Maltodextrin
description: High glycemic index carbohydrate that spikes blood sugar quickly.

name: Aspartame
description: Artificial sweetener with debated neurological effects.

name: Saccharin
description: Artificial sweetener that may cross the placenta.

name: Acesulfame-K
description: Artificial sweetener often used in combination with sucralose or aspartame.

name: Partially hydrogenated oils
description: Artificial trans fats that raise bad cholesterol and lower good cholesterol.

name: Palm oil
description: High in saturated fat; also poses significant environmental and sustainability concerns.

name: Tartrazine
description: Synthetic lemon yellow azo dye, linked to hyperactivity in children and allergic reactions.

name: Sunset Yellow FCF
description: Synthetic yellow azo dye, may cause hyperactivity in children.

name: Sodium Benzoate
description: Preservative that may form benzene (a carcinogen) when combined with Vitamin C.

name: Monosodium Glutamate
description: Flavor enhancer. Safe for most, but may cause sensitivities or headaches in some individuals.

name: Sodium Nitrite
description: Preservative in processed meats, linked to increased cancer risk (nitrosamines).

name: Sucralose
description: Artificial sweetener that may alter gut microbiome and trigger insulin resistance.
